nonBlockingIssues.description: Comma splice/typo in docs/modules/core-idempotency.md §4.9 line 350: 'protection, This' should be 'protection. This'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for docs workers to check for duplicate rows in tabular docs (INDEX.md, MODULE-INVENTORY.md) before adding new entries. Two separate workers in this milestone added rows to INDEX.md for the same packet, creating a duplicate that required cleanup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-platform-core-audit-runtime-contracts had to remove a duplicate INDEX.md row left by a previous worker session. The feature description itself flagged this: 'finish and validate that draft state, including removing the duplicate index row'.

rejectedObservations.observation: architecture.md library file does not document the dual runtime enforcement service pattern (TenantRuntimeEnforcementService vs TenantRuntimeAccessService)
rejectedObservations.reason: This knowledge is now captured in the canonical docs tree at docs/modules/core-audit-runtime-settings.md. Adding it to .factory/library/architecture.md would create a second truth source. The canonical docs are the right place for this.

rejectedObservations.observation: Idempotency contract inconsistencies should be captured in .factory/library/ for future workers
rejectedObservations.reason: This knowledge is already thoroughly documented in docs/modules/core-idempotency.md §4 (nine contract inconsistencies). The canonical docs tree is the appropriate location, not the library.

rejectedObservations.observation: core-idempotency.md §5.2 is the canonical integration point and future workers should update it
rejectedObservations.reason: This is already discoverable from the canonical docs structure. No action needed outside the docs tree.
